title: Apple veteran's Chinese smart-glasses firm becomes unicorn as Tencent, Meituan fund rival to Meta
summary_full: The Shenzhen-based startup joined a slew of global peers to build advanced gadgets and electronics that bring the benefits of AI to individual users.
summary_public: The Shenzhen-based startup joined a slew of global peers to build advanced gadgets and electronics that bring the benefits of AI to individual users.
